summary: Classified the 10 listed PR-inventory candidates independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No close, merge, fix, or security-route action is planned: low-signal and instant close are disabled, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, no security-sensitive items were detected, and the open PRs all have active review/proof/check/maintainer-context reasons to remain open. #90267 is already closed and is recorded as skipped keep_closed.
